strategy_summary: Mounds of West African termites are built to shed water via mushroom-like shape. “In West Africa and other areas where there is heavy rain, the colonies build nests like mushrooms with flat roofs which shed the water.” (Attenborough 1979:100)
mechanism:
Mounds of West African termites are built to shed water via mushroom-like shape.

“In West Africa and other areas where there is heavy rain, the colonies build nests like mushrooms with flat roofs which shed the water.” (Attenborough 1979:100)
